summary: Hey David, what a week! You're down to 260.4 lbs, which means you've now lost 54.6 lbs total since starting—that's a massive achievement and a real testament to your commitment. Your steady pace of 1.2 lbs per week over the last two weeks shows your body is responding well to the Mounjaro and your efforts. Next week, I'd love to see you dial in your Dexcom insights even more—maybe identify one meal or snack that keeps your glucose stable longest, so you can build on what's already working. You're crushing this, and the consistency you're showing right now is exactly what sustainable weight loss looks like.
